   │           Var (name=node) (bindingState=bound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
   └── ExtensionElem (count) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
         Count (Distinct) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
            Var (name=node) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?node) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?threshold { 4 }
  ?node a <http://example.com/theme/connected/Node> .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/weight> ?w2 .
    FILTER (?w2 < ?threshold)
  }
  ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/weight> ?w .
  FILTER (?w IN (4, 5, 6))
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX conn: <http://example.com/theme/connected/>
SELECT ?node (COUNT(DISTINCT ?neighbor) AS ?neighborCount) WHERE {
  { ?node a conn:Node ; conn:connectsTo ?neighbor . }
  UNION
  { ?neighbor conn:connectsTo ?node . }
  OPTIONAL { ?node conn:weight ?w . BIND(?w AS ?optWeight) }
  FILTER(?optWeight != 0)
}
GROUP BY ?node
HAVING(COUNT(?neighbor) > 0)

718.628 ms/op

            Var (name=neighbor) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT ?node (COUNT(DISTINCT ?neighbor) AS ?neighborCount) WHERE {
  {
    ?node a <http://example.com/theme/connected/Node> .
    ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo> ?neighbor .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?neighbor <http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo> ?node .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/weight> ?w .
    BIND(?w AS ?optWeight)
  }
  FILTER (?optWeight != 0)
}
GROUP BY ?node
HAVING (COUNT(?neighbor) > 0)

   └── ExtensionElem (neighborCount) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
         Count (Distinct) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
            Var (name=neighbor) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT ?node (COUNT(DISTINCT ?neighbor) AS ?neighborCount) WHERE {
  {
    ?node a <http://example.com/theme/connected/Node> .
    ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo> ?neighbor .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?neighbor <http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo> ?node .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/weight> ?w .
    BIND(?w AS ?optWeight)
  }
  FILTER (?optWeight != 0)
}
GROUP BY ?node
HAVING (COUNT(?neighbor) > 0)

# Run progress: 57.95% complete, ETA 00:11:35
# Fork: 1 of 1
# Warmup Iteration   1:
### Original Query ###
PREFIX conn: <http://example.com/theme/connected/>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?node) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?node a conn:Node ; conn:weight ?w .
  FILTER(?w = 8 || ?w = 9)
  FILTER EXISTS { ?node conn:connectsTo ?neighbor . }
  MINUS { ?neighbor conn:connectsTo ?node . FILTER(?neighbor = ?node) }
}

   │  ║           s: Var (name=neighbor) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ║           p: Var (name=_const_2e732754_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo, anonymous)
   │  ║           o: Var (name=node) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ╚══ GroupElem (count)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=node) (bindingState=bound)
   └── ExtensionElem (count)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=node) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?node) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/weight> ?w .
  FILTER ((?w = 8) || (?w = 9))
  ?node a <http://example.com/theme/connected/Node> .
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo> ?neighbor .
  }
  MINUS {
    ?neighbor <http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo> ?node .
    FILTER (?neighbor = ?node)
  }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?node) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/weight> ?w .
  FILTER ((?w = 8) || (?w = 9))
  ?node a <http://example.com/theme/connected/Node> .
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo> ?neighbor .
  }
  MINUS {
    ?neighbor <http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo> ?node .
    FILTER (?neighbor = ?node)
  }
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX conn: <http://example.com/theme/connected/>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?node) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?node a conn:Node ; conn:connectsTo ?mid .
  ?mid conn:connectsTo ?end .
  OPTIONAL { ?node conn:weight ?optWeight . }
  FILTER(?optWeight IN (7, 8, 9))
  FILTER EXISTS { ?end conn:connectsTo ?node . }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?node) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?node a <http://example.com/theme/connected/Node> .
  ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo> ?mid .
  ?mid <http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo> ?end .
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?end <http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo> ?node .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/weight> ?optWeight .
  }
  FILTER (?optWeight IN (7, 8, 9))
}

# Run progress: 60.23% complete, ETA 00:11:00

### Original Query ###
PREFIX conn: <http://example.com/theme/connected/>
SELECT ?node (COUNT(DISTINCT ?neighbor) AS ?degree) WHERE {
  { ?node conn:connectsTo ?neighbor . }
  UNION
  { ?neighbor conn:connectsTo ?node . }
  OPTIONAL { ?neighbor conn:weight ?w . BIND(?w AS ?optWeight) }
  FILTER(?optWeight != 0)
}
GROUP BY ?node
HAVING(COUNT(?neighbor) > 1)

SELECT ?node (COUNT(DISTINCT ?neighbor) AS ?degree) WHERE {
  ?node (<http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo>|^<http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo>) ?neighbor .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?neighbor <http://example.com/theme/connected/weight> ?w .
    BIND(?w AS ?optWeight)
  }
  FILTER (?optWeight != 0)
}
GROUP BY ?node
HAVING (COUNT(?neighbor) > 1)

            Var (name=neighbor) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT ?node (COUNT(DISTINCT ?neighbor) AS ?degree) WHERE {
  ?node (<http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo>|^<http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo>) ?neighbor .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?neighbor <http://example.com/theme/connected/weight> ?w .
    BIND(?w AS ?optWeight)
  }
  FILTER (?optWeight != 0)
}
GROUP BY ?node
HAVING (COUNT(?neighbor) > 1)

# Run progress: 61.36% complete, ETA 00:10:43

# Warmup Iteration   1:
### Original Query ###
PREFIX conn: <http://example.com/theme/connected/>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?node) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?threshold { 3 }
  ?node a conn:Node ; conn:weight ?w .
  FILTER(?w IN (1, 2, 3, 4))
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?node conn:connectsTo ?n2 .
                      ?n2 conn:weight ?w2 . FILTER(?w2 < ?threshold) }
  MINUS { ?node conn:connectsTo ?node . }
}

   │  ║           s: Var (name=node) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║           p: Var (name=_const_909a60a8_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/connected/weight, anonymous)

   │  ╚══ GroupElem (count)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=node) (bindingState=bound)
   └── ExtensionElem (count)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=node) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?node) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?threshold { 3 }
  ?node a <http://example.com/theme/connected/Node> .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo> ?node .
    BIND(?node AS ?_anon_path_819e85ee0da6629436e9608295da6b90e7b01234567)
  }
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo> ?n2 .
    ?n2 <http://example.com/theme/connected/weight> ?w2 .
    FILTER (?w2 < ?threshold)
  }
  ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/weight> ?w .
  FILTER (?w IN (1, 2, 3, 4))
}

            Var (name=node) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?node) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?threshold { 3 }
  ?node a <http://example.com/theme/connected/Node> .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo> ?node .
    BIND(?node AS ?_anon_path_429e85ee0da6629436e9608295da6b90e7b0123)
  }
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/connectsTo> ?n2 .
    ?n2 <http://example.com/theme/connected/weight> ?w2 .
    FILTER (?w2 < ?threshold)
  }
  ?node <http://example.com/theme/connected/weight> ?w .
  FILTER (?w IN (1, 2, 3, 4))
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX train: <http://example.com/theme/train/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?service) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?service a train:TrainService .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?service train:scheduledTime ?time .
    BIND(?time AS ?optTime)
  }
  FILTER(?optTime > "08:00:00"^^xsd:time)
  OPTIONAL { ?service train:name ?name . }
}

   └── ExtensionElem (count) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
         Count (Distinct) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
            Var (name=service) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?service) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?service a <http://example.com/theme/train/TrainService> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?service <http://example.com/theme/train/scheduledTime> ?time .
    BIND(?time AS ?optTime)
  }
  FILTER (?optTime > "08:00:00"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#time>)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?service <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?name .
  }
}

# Run progress: 63.64% complete, ETA 00:10:05
# Fork: 1 of 1
# Warmup Iteration   1:
### Original Query ###
PREFIX train: <http://example.com/theme/train/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?entity) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?target { "OP 1" "OP 2" }
  { ?entity a train:OperationalPoint ; train:name ?name . }
  UNION
  { ?entity a train:Line ; train:name ?name . }
  FILTER(?name = ?target || ?name = "OP 3")
  OPTIONAL { ?entity train:connectsOperationalPoint ?op . }
}

   │  ║  └── StatementPattern (costEstimate=38.4K, resultSizeEstimate=1.00, plannedAccessRows=1.00, plannedAccessWorkRows=1.00, plannedRepeatedInvocations=38.4K, plannedIndexPrefixLength=2.00, plannedAccessPathCandidates=4.00, plannedDistinctLookupBindings=38.4K, plannedWorkRows=38.4K, plannedIndexName=spoc, plannedIndexAccessMode=directLookup, plannedLookupComponents=[S, P], plannerId=lmdb-sketch, plannedEstimateSource=lmdb-access-path) [right]
   │  ║        s: Var (name=entity) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║        p: Var (name=_const_26ff10d8_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/train/connectsOperationalPoint, anonymous)
   │  ║        o: Var (name=op) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ╚══ GroupElem (count)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=entity) (bindingState=bound)
   └── ExtensionElem (count)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=entity) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?entity) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?entity a <http://example.com/theme/train/OperationalPoint> .
    ?entity <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?name .
    VALUES ?target { "OP 1" "OP 2" }
    FILTER ((?name = ?target) || (?name = "OP 3"))
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?entity a <http://example.com/theme/train/Line> .
    ?entity <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?name .
    VALUES ?target { "OP 1" "OP 2" }
    FILTER ((?name = ?target) || (?name = "OP 3"))
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?entity <http://example.com/theme/train/connectsOperationalPoint> ?op .
  }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?entity) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?entity a <http://example.com/theme/train/OperationalPoint> .
    ?entity <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?name .
    VALUES ?target { "OP 1" "OP 2" }
    FILTER ((?name = ?target) || (?name = "OP 3"))
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?entity a <http://example.com/theme/train/Line> .
    ?entity <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?name .
    VALUES ?target { "OP 1" "OP 2" }
    FILTER ((?name = ?target) || (?name = "OP 3"))
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?entity <http://example.com/theme/train/connectsOperationalPoint> ?op .
  }
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX train: <http://example.com/theme/train/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?line (COUNT(DISTINCT ?section) AS ?sectionCount) WHERE {
  ?line a train:Line ; train:name ?lineName .
  FILTER(?lineName IN ("Line 0", "Line 1", "Line 2"))
  OPTIONAL { ?section train:partOfLine ?line . }
}
GROUP BY ?line
HAVING(COUNT(?section) > 0)

SELECT ?line (COUNT(DISTINCT ?section) AS ?sectionCount) WHERE {
  VALUES ?lineName { "Line 0" "Line 1" "Line 2" }
  ?line <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?lineName .
  FILTER (?lineName IN ("Line 0", "Line 1", "Line 2"))
  ?line a <http://example.com/theme/train/Line> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?section <http://example.com/theme/train/partOfLine> ?line .
  }
}
GROUP BY ?line
HAVING (COUNT(?section) > 0)

         Count (Distinct) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
            Var (name=section) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT ?line (COUNT(DISTINCT ?section) AS ?sectionCount) WHERE {
  VALUES ?lineName { "Line 0" "Line 1" "Line 2" }
  ?line <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?lineName .
  FILTER (?lineName IN ("Line 0", "Line 1", "Line 2"))
  ?line a <http://example.com/theme/train/Line> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?section <http://example.com/theme/train/partOfLine> ?line .
  }
}
GROUP BY ?line
HAVING (COUNT(?section) > 0)

# Run progress: 65.91% complete, ETA 00:09:26
# Fork: 1 of 1
# Warmup Iteration   1:
### Original Query ###
PREFIX train: <http://example.com/theme/train/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?section) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?section a train:SectionOfLine ; train:partOfLine ?line .
  OPTIONAL { ?section train:hasTrackSection ?track . BIND(?track AS ?optTrack) }
  FILTER(?optTrack != ?section)
  MINUS { ?line train:name ?name . FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?name), "Line 0")) }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?section) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?section a <http://example.com/theme/train/SectionOfLine> .
  ?section <http://example.com/theme/train/partOfLine> ?line .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?section <http://example.com/theme/train/hasTrackSection> ?track .
    BIND(?track AS ?optTrack)
  }
  FILTER (?optTrack != ?section)
  MINUS {
    ?line <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?name .
    FILTER (CONTAINS(STR(?name), "Line 0"))
  }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?section) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?section a <http://example.com/theme/train/SectionOfLine> .
  ?section <http://example.com/theme/train/partOfLine> ?line .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?section <http://example.com/theme/train/hasTrackSection> ?track .
    BIND(?track AS ?optTrack)
  }
  FILTER (?optTrack != ?section)
  MINUS {
    ?line <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?name .
    FILTER (CONTAINS(STR(?name), "Line 0"))
  }
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX train: <http://example.com/theme/train/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?line) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?line a train:Line ; train:name ?name .
  FILTER(?name = "Line 1" || ?name = "Line 2")
  FILTER EXISTS { ?section train:partOfLine ?line . }
  OPTIONAL { ?section train:connectsOperationalPoint ?op . }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?line) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?name { "Line 1" "Line 2" }
  ?line <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?name .
  ?line a <http://example.com/theme/train/Line> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?section <http://example.com/theme/train/connectsOperationalPoint> ?op .
  }
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?section <http://example.com/theme/train/partOfLine> ?line .
  }
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX train: <http://example.com/theme/train/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?service) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?threshold { "10:00:00"^^xsd:time }
  ?service a train:TrainService ; train:scheduledTime ?time .
  FILTER(?time IN ("08:00:00"^^xsd:time, "09:00:00"^^xsd:time))
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?service train:scheduledTime ?late . FILTER(?late > ?threshold) }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?service) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?threshold { "10:00:00"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#time> }
  ?service <http://example.com/theme/train/scheduledTime> ?time .
  FILTER (?time IN ("08:00:00"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#time>, "09:00:00"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#time>))
  ?service a <http://example.com/theme/train/TrainService> .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?service <http://example.com/theme/train/scheduledTime> ?late .
    FILTER (?late > ?threshold)
  }
}

# Parameters: (themeName = TRAIN, z_queryIndex = 6)

# Run progress: 69.32% complete, ETA 00:08:29
# Fork: 1 of 1
# Warmup Iteration   1:
### Original Query ###
PREFIX train: <http://example.com/theme/train/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?line (COUNT(DISTINCT ?service) AS ?serviceCount) WHERE {
  { ?service a train:TrainService ; train:runsOnSection ?section .
    ?section train:partOfLine ?line . }
  UNION
  { ?line a train:Line . }
  OPTIONAL { ?line train:name ?optName . }
  FILTER(?optName != "")
}
GROUP BY ?line
HAVING(COUNT(?service) > 0)

   │  ║           Count
   │  ║              Var (name=service) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║        GroupElem (serviceCount)
   │  ║           Count (Distinct)
   │  ║              Var (name=service) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ╚══ ExtensionElem (_anon_having_696cc65b0ecc95f4889bbe0d5bac071314a012345)
   │        Count
   │           Var (name=service) (bindingState=unbound)
   └── ExtensionElem (serviceCount)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=service) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT ?line (COUNT(DISTINCT ?service) AS ?serviceCount) WHERE {
  {
    ?service a <http://example.com/theme/train/TrainService> .
    ?service <http://example.com/theme/train/runsOnSection> ?section .
    ?section <http://example.com/theme/train/partOfLine> ?line .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?line a <http://example.com/theme/train/Line> .
  }
  ?line <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?optName .
  FILTER (?optName != "")
}
GROUP BY ?line
HAVING (COUNT(?service) > 0)

         Count (Distinct) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
            Var (name=service) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT ?line (COUNT(DISTINCT ?service) AS ?serviceCount) WHERE {
  {
    ?service a <http://example.com/theme/train/TrainService> .
    ?service <http://example.com/theme/train/runsOnSection> ?section .
    ?section <http://example.com/theme/train/partOfLine> ?line .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?line a <http://example.com/theme/train/Line> .
  }
  ?line <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?optName .
  FILTER (?optName != "")
}
GROUP BY ?line
HAVING (COUNT(?service) > 0)

# Run progress: 70.45% complete, ETA 00:08:10
# Fork: 1 of 1
# Warmup Iteration   1:
### Original Query ###
PREFIX train: <http://example.com/theme/train/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?op) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?op a train:OperationalPoint ; train:name ?name .
  FILTER(?name = "OP 1" || ?name = "OP 2")
  FILTER EXISTS { ?service train:passesThrough ?op . }
  MINUS { ?op train:name ?name2 . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name2)), "op 0")) }
}

   │  ║              s: Var (name=op) (bindingState=bound)

   │  ╚══ GroupElem (count)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=op) (bindingState=bound)
   └── ExtensionElem (count)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=op) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?op) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?name { "OP 1" "OP 2" }
  ?op <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?name .
  ?op a <http://example.com/theme/train/OperationalPoint> .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    {
      ?op <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?name2 .
      FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name2)), "op 0"))
    }
  }
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?service <http://example.com/theme/train/passesThrough> ?op .
  }
}

         Count (Distinct) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
            Var (name=op) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?op) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?name { "OP 1" "OP 2" }
  ?op <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?name .
  ?op a <http://example.com/theme/train/OperationalPoint> .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    {
      ?op <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?name2 .
      FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name2)), "op 0"))
    }
  }
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?service <http://example.com/theme/train/passesThrough> ?op .
  }
}

# Run progress: 71.59% complete, ETA 00:07:51

# Warmup Iteration   1:
### Original Query ###
PREFIX train: <http://example.com/theme/train/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?service) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?service a train:TrainService ; train:runsOnSection ?s1 ; train:runsOnSection ?s2 .
  ?s1 train:partOfLine ?line .
  ?s2 train:partOfLine ?line .
  OPTIONAL { ?line train:name ?optName . }
  FILTER(?optName IN ("Line 0", "Line 1"))
  FILTER EXISTS { ?s1 train:connectsOperationalPoint ?op .
                  ?s2 train:connectsOperationalPoint ?op . }
}

   │  ╚══ GroupElem (count)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=service) (bindingState=bound)
   └── ExtensionElem (count)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=service) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?service) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?optName { "Line 0" "Line 1" }
  ?line <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?optName .
  FILTER (?optName IN ("Line 0", "Line 1"))
  ?s1 <http://example.com/theme/train/partOfLine> ?line .
  ?service <http://example.com/theme/train/runsOnSection> ?s1 .
  ?service a <http://example.com/theme/train/TrainService> .
  ?service <http://example.com/theme/train/runsOnSection> ?s2 .
  ?s2 <http://example.com/theme/train/partOfLine> ?line .
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?s1 <http://example.com/theme/train/connectsOperationalPoint> ?op .
    ?s2 <http://example.com/theme/train/connectsOperationalPoint> ?op .
  }
}

            Var (name=service) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?service) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?optName { "Line 0" "Line 1" }
  ?line <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?optName .
  FILTER (?optName IN ("Line 0", "Line 1"))
  ?s1 <http://example.com/theme/train/partOfLine> ?line .
  ?service <http://example.com/theme/train/runsOnSection> ?s1 .
  ?service a <http://example.com/theme/train/TrainService> .
  ?service <http://example.com/theme/train/runsOnSection> ?s2 .
  ?s2 <http://example.com/theme/train/partOfLine> ?line .
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?s1 <http://example.com/theme/train/connectsOperationalPoint> ?op .
    ?s2 <http://example.com/theme/train/connectsOperationalPoint> ?op .
  }
}

# Run progress: 72.73% complete, ETA 00:07:32

# Warmup Iteration   1:
### Original Query ###
PREFIX train: <http://example.com/theme/train/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?section (COUNT(DISTINCT ?track) AS ?trackCount) WHERE {
  ?section a train:SectionOfLine ; train:hasTrackSection ?track .
  OPTIONAL { ?section train:connectsOperationalPoint ?op . BIND(?op AS ?optOp) }
  FILTER(?optOp != ?section)
  FILTER EXISTS { ?track a train:TrackSection . }
}
GROUP BY ?section
HAVING(COUNT(?track) > 0)

   │  ║           ║           o: Var (name=_const_b0bb051f_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/train/SectionOfLine, anonymous)
   │  ║           ╚══ Extension (costEstimate=67.4K, resultSizeEstimate=1.00, plannedWorkRows=67.4K, plannerId=lmdb-sketch, plannedEstimateSource=lmdb-synthetic) [right]
   │  ║              ├── StatementPattern (costEstimate=67.4K, resultSizeEstimate=1.00, plannedAccessRows=1.00, plannedAccessWorkRows=1.00, plannedRepeatedInvocations=67.4K, plannedIndexPrefixLength=2.00, plannedAccessPathCandidates=4.00, plannedDistinctLookupBindings=67.4K, plannedWorkRows=67.4K, plannedIndexName=spoc, plannedIndexAccessMode=directLookup, plannedLookupComponents=[S, P], plannerId=lmdb-sketch, plannedEstimateSource=lmdb-access-path)
   │  ║              │     s: Var (name=section) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║              │     p: Var (name=_const_26ff10d8_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/train/connectsOperationalPoint, anonymous)
   │  ║              │     o: Var (name=op) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ║              └── ExtensionElem (optOp)
   │  ║                    Var (name=op) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║        GroupElem (_anon_having_596fed5d689e0344255ba9c61bc4210d81a01234)
   │  ║           Count
   │  ║              Var (name=track) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║        GroupElem (trackCount)
   │  ║           Count (Distinct)
   │  ║              Var (name=track) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ╚══ ExtensionElem (_anon_having_596fed5d689e0344255ba9c61bc4210d81a01234)
   │        Count
   │           Var (name=track) (bindingState=unbound)
   └── ExtensionElem (trackCount)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=track) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT ?section (COUNT(DISTINCT ?track) AS ?trackCount) WHERE {
  ?section <http://example.com/theme/train/hasTrackSection> ?track .
  ?section a <http://example.com/theme/train/SectionOfLine> .
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?track a <http://example.com/theme/train/TrackSection> .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?section <http://example.com/theme/train/connectsOperationalPoint> ?op .
    BIND(?op AS ?optOp)
  }
  FILTER (?optOp != ?section)
}
GROUP BY ?section
HAVING (COUNT(?track) > 0)

         Count (Distinct) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
            Var (name=track) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT ?section (COUNT(DISTINCT ?track) AS ?trackCount) WHERE {
  ?section <http://example.com/theme/train/hasTrackSection> ?track .
  ?section a <http://example.com/theme/train/SectionOfLine> .
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?track a <http://example.com/theme/train/TrackSection> .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?section <http://example.com/theme/train/connectsOperationalPoint> ?op .
    BIND(?op AS ?optOp)
  }
  FILTER (?optOp != ?section)
}
GROUP BY ?section
HAVING (COUNT(?track) > 0)

# Run progress: 73.86% complete, ETA 00:07:13

# Warmup Iteration   1:
### Original Query ###
PREFIX train: <http://example.com/theme/train/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?op) AS ?count) WHERE {
  { ?op a train:OperationalPoint . }
  UNION
  { ?op a train:OperationalPoint ; train:name ?name . }
  OPTIONAL { ?section train:connectsOperationalPoint ?op . BIND(?section AS ?optSection) }
  FILTER(?optSection != ?op)
  MINUS { ?op train:name ?name2 . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name2)), "op 1")) }
}

   │  ║     ╠══ FunctionCall (http://www.w3.org/2005/xpath-functions#contains)

   │  ║     ║  │     Str

   │  ║     ║  └── ValueConstant (value="op 1")
   │  ║     ╚══ StatementPattern (costEstimate=47.0K, resultSizeEstimate=47.0K, plannedAccessRows=47.0K, plannedAccessWorkRows=47.0K, plannedIndexPrefixLength=1.00, plannedAccessPathCandidates=4.00, plannedWorkRows=47.0K, plannedIndexName=posc, plannedIndexAccessMode=prefixScan, plannedLookupComponents=[P], plannerId=lmdb-sketch, plannedEstimateSource=lmdb-access-path)
   │  ║           s: Var (name=op) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ║           p: Var (name=_const_cf02f21c_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/train/name, anonymous)
   │  ║           o: Var (name=name2) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ╚══ GroupElem (count)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=op) (bindingState=bound)
   └── ExtensionElem (count)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=op) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?op) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?op a <http://example.com/theme/train/OperationalPoint> .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?op a <http://example.com/theme/train/OperationalPoint> .
    ?op <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?name .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?section <http://example.com/theme/train/connectsOperationalPoint> ?op .
    BIND(?section AS ?optSection)
  }
  FILTER (?optSection != ?op)
  MINUS {
    ?op <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?name2 .
    FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name2)), "op 1"))
  }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?op) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?op a <http://example.com/theme/train/OperationalPoint> .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?op a <http://example.com/theme/train/OperationalPoint> .
    ?op <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?name .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?section <http://example.com/theme/train/connectsOperationalPoint> ?op .
    BIND(?section AS ?optSection)
  }
  FILTER (?optSection != ?op)
  MINUS {
    ?op <http://example.com/theme/train/name> ?name2 .
    FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name2)), "op 1"))
  }
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX grid: <http://example.com/theme/grid/>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?substation) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?substation a grid:Substation .
  OPTIONAL { ?generator grid:feeds ?substation ; grid:capacity ?cap . BIND(?cap AS ?optCap) }
  FILTER(?optCap > 600)
  OPTIONAL { ?substation grid:name ?name . }
}

         Count (Distinct) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
            Var (name=substation) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?substation) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?substation a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Substation> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?generator <http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds> ?substation .
    ?generator <http://example.com/theme/grid/capacity> ?cap .
    BIND(?cap AS ?optCap)
  }
  FILTER (?optCap > 600)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?substation <http://example.com/theme/grid/name> ?name .
  }
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX grid: <http://example.com/theme/grid/>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?entity) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?target { "Substation 1" "Substation 2" }
  { ?entity a grid:Substation ; grid:name ?name . }
  UNION
  { ?entity a grid:Generator ; grid:feeds ?substation . ?substation grid:name ?name . }
  FILTER(?name = ?target || ?name = "Substation 3")
  OPTIONAL { ?entity grid:feeds ?substation2 . }
}

   │  ║  │        ║        Var (name=name) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║  │        ║        ValueConstant (value="Substation 3")
   │  ║  │        ╚══ BindingSetAssignment ([[target="Substation 1"], [target="Substation 2"]]) (costEstimate=1.00, resultSizeEstimate=1.00, plannedWorkRows=1.00, plannerId=lmdb-sketch, plannedEstimateSource=generic-statistics)
   │  ║  └── StatementPattern (costEstimate=18.7K, resultSizeEstimate=1.00, plannedAccessRows=1.00, plannedAccessWorkRows=1.00, plannedRepeatedInvocations=18.7K, plannedIndexPrefixLength=2.00, plannedAccessPathCandidates=4.00, plannedDistinctLookupBindings=18.7K, plannedWorkRows=18.7K, plannedIndexName=spoc, plannedIndexAccessMode=directLookup, plannedLookupComponents=[S, P], plannerId=lmdb-sketch, plannedEstimateSource=lmdb-access-path) [right]
   │  ║        s: Var (name=entity) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║        p: Var (name=_const_35542676_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds, anonymous)
   │  ║        o: Var (name=substation2) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ╚══ GroupElem (count)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=entity) (bindingState=bound)
   └── ExtensionElem (count)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=entity) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?entity) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?entity a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Substation> .
    ?entity <http://example.com/theme/grid/name> ?name .
    VALUES ?target { "Substation 1" "Substation 2" }
    FILTER ((?name = ?target) || (?name = "Substation 3"))
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?entity a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Generator> .
    ?entity <http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds> ?substation .
    ?substation <http://example.com/theme/grid/name> ?name .
    VALUES ?target { "Substation 1" "Substation 2" }
    FILTER ((?name = ?target) || (?name = "Substation 3"))
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?entity <http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds> ?substation2 .
  }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?entity) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?entity a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Substation> .
    ?entity <http://example.com/theme/grid/name> ?name .
    VALUES ?target { "Substation 1" "Substation 2" }
    FILTER ((?name = ?target) || (?name = "Substation 3"))
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?entity a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Generator> .
    ?entity <http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds> ?substation .
    ?substation <http://example.com/theme/grid/name> ?name .
    VALUES ?target { "Substation 1" "Substation 2" }
    FILTER ((?name = ?target) || (?name = "Substation 3"))
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?entity <http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds> ?substation2 .
  }
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX grid: <http://example.com/theme/grid/>
SELECT ?transformer (COUNT(DISTINCT ?meter) AS ?meterCount) WHERE {
  ?transformer a grid:Transformer ; grid:feeds ?substation .
  ?substation grid:name ?name .
  FILTER(?name IN ("Substation 0", "Substation 1", "Substation 2"))
  OPTIONAL { ?transformer grid:hasMeter ?meter . }
}
GROUP BY ?transformer
HAVING(COUNT(?meter) > 0)

SELECT ?transformer (COUNT(DISTINCT ?meter) AS ?meterCount) WHERE {
  VALUES ?name { "Substation 0" "Substation 1" "Substation 2" }
  ?substation <http://example.com/theme/grid/name> ?name .
  FILTER (?name IN ("Substation 0", "Substation 1", "Substation 2"))
  ?transformer <http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds> ?substation .
  ?transformer a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Transformer> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?transformer <http://example.com/theme/grid/hasMeter> ?meter .
  }
}
GROUP BY ?transformer
HAVING (COUNT(?meter) > 0)

SELECT ?transformer (COUNT(DISTINCT ?meter) AS ?meterCount) WHERE {
  VALUES ?name { "Substation 0" "Substation 1" "Substation 2" }
  ?substation <http://example.com/theme/grid/name> ?name .
  FILTER (?name IN ("Substation 0", "Substation 1", "Substation 2"))
  ?transformer <http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds> ?substation .
  ?transformer a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Transformer> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?transformer <http://example.com/theme/grid/hasMeter> ?meter .
  }
}
GROUP BY ?transformer
HAVING (COUNT(?meter) > 0)

### Original Query ###
PREFIX grid: <http://example.com/theme/grid/>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?meter) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?meter a grid:Meter ; grid:measures ?load .
  OPTIONAL { ?load grid:loadValue ?value . BIND(?value AS ?optValue) }
  FILTER(?optValue > 100)
  MINUS { ?meter grid:measures ?load2 . ?load2 grid:loadValue ?value2 . FILTER(?value2 > 180) }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?meter) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?meter a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Meter> .
  ?meter <http://example.com/theme/grid/measures> ?load .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?load <http://example.com/theme/grid/loadValue> ?value .
    BIND(?value AS ?optValue)
  }
  FILTER (?optValue > 100)
  MINUS {
    ?meter <http://example.com/theme/grid/measures> ?load2 .
    {
      {
        ?load2 <http://example.com/theme/grid/loadValue> ?value2 .
        FILTER (?value2 > 180)
      }
    }
  }
}

   └── ExtensionElem (count) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
         Count (Distinct) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
            Var (name=meter) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?meter) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?meter a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Meter> .
  ?meter <http://example.com/theme/grid/measures> ?load .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?load <http://example.com/theme/grid/loadValue> ?value .
    BIND(?value AS ?optValue)
  }
  FILTER (?optValue > 100)
  MINUS {
    ?meter <http://example.com/theme/grid/measures> ?load2 .
    {
      {
        ?load2 <http://example.com/theme/grid/loadValue> ?value2 .
        FILTER (?value2 > 180)
      }
    }
  }
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX grid: <http://example.com/theme/grid/>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?line) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?line a grid:Line ; grid:connectsTo ?substation .
  ?substation grid:name ?name .
  FILTER(?name = "Substation 0" || ?name = "Substation 1")
  FILTER EXISTS { ?line grid:connectsTo ?other . }
  OPTIONAL { ?line grid:connectsTo ?other2 . }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?line) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?name { "Substation 0" "Substation 1" }
  ?substation <http://example.com/theme/grid/name> ?name .
  ?line <http://example.com/theme/grid/connectsTo> ?substation .
  ?line a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Line> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?line <http://example.com/theme/grid/connectsTo> ?other2 .
  }
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?line <http://example.com/theme/grid/connectsTo> ?other .
  }
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX grid: <http://example.com/theme/grid/>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?generator) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?threshold { 700 }
  ?generator a grid:Generator ; grid:capacity ?capacity .
  FILTER(?capacity IN (700, 800, 900))
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?generator grid:capacity ?cap2 . FILTER(?cap2 < ?threshold) }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?generator) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?threshold { 700 }
  ?generator <http://example.com/theme/grid/capacity> ?capacity .
  FILTER (?capacity IN (700, 800, 900))
  ?generator a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Generator> .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?generator <http://example.com/theme/grid/capacity> ?cap2 .
    FILTER (?cap2 < ?threshold)
  }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?generator) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?threshold { 700 }
  ?generator <http://example.com/theme/grid/capacity> ?capacity .
  FILTER (?capacity IN (700, 800, 900))
  ?generator a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Generator> .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?generator <http://example.com/theme/grid/capacity> ?cap2 .
    FILTER (?cap2 < ?threshold)
  }
}

# Run progress: 81.82% complete, ETA 00:05:00

# Warmup Iteration   1:
### Original Query ###
PREFIX grid: <http://example.com/theme/grid/>
SELECT ?substation (COUNT(DISTINCT ?asset) AS ?assetCount) WHERE {
  { ?asset a grid:Transformer ; grid:feeds ?substation . }
  UNION
  { ?asset a grid:Generator ; grid:feeds ?substation . }
  OPTIONAL { ?asset grid:feeds ?substation . BIND(?substation AS ?optSub) }
  FILTER(?optSub != ?asset)
}
GROUP BY ?substation
HAVING(COUNT(?asset) > 0)

   │  ║              ├── StatementPattern (costEstimate=37.4K, resultSizeEstimate=0, plannedAccessRows=0, plannedAccessWorkRows=1.00, plannedRepeatedInvocations=37.4K, plannedIndexPrefixLength=3.00, plannedAccessPathCandidates=4.00, plannedDistinctLookupBindings=37.4K, plannedWorkRows=37.4K, plannedIndexName=spoc, plannedIndexAccessMode=directLookup, plannedLookupComponents=[S, P, O], plannerId=lmdb-sketch, plannedEstimateSource=lmdb-access-path)
   │  ║              │     s: Var (name=asset) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║              │     p: Var (name=_const_35542676_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds, anonymous)
   │  ║              │     o: Var (name=substation) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║              └── ExtensionElem (optSub)
   │  ║                    Var (name=substation) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║        GroupElem (_anon_having_65527bbb35ef8a9b47e382d559b613b325ef012345)
   │  ║           Count
   │  ║              Var (name=asset) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║        GroupElem (assetCount)
   │  ║           Count (Distinct)
   │  ║              Var (name=asset) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ╚══ ExtensionElem (_anon_having_65527bbb35ef8a9b47e382d559b613b325ef012345)
   │        Count
   │           Var (name=asset) (bindingState=unbound)
   └── ExtensionElem (assetCount)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=asset) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT ?substation (COUNT(DISTINCT ?asset) AS ?assetCount) WHERE {
  {
    ?asset a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Transformer> .
    ?asset <http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds> ?substation .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?asset a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Generator> .
    ?asset <http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds> ?substation .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?asset <http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds> ?substation .
    BIND(?substation AS ?optSub)
  }
  FILTER (?optSub != ?asset)
}
GROUP BY ?substation
HAVING (COUNT(?asset) > 0)

         Count (Distinct) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
            Var (name=asset) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT ?substation (COUNT(DISTINCT ?asset) AS ?assetCount) WHERE {
  {
    ?asset a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Transformer> .
    ?asset <http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds> ?substation .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?asset a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Generator> .
    ?asset <http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds> ?substation .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?asset <http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds> ?substation .
    BIND(?substation AS ?optSub)
  }
  FILTER (?optSub != ?asset)
}
GROUP BY ?substation
HAVING (COUNT(?asset) > 0)

### Original Query ###
PREFIX grid: <http://example.com/theme/grid/>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?transformer) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?transformer a grid:Transformer ; grid:feeds ?substation .
  ?substation grid:name ?name .
  FILTER(?name = "Substation 0" || ?name = "Substation 1")
  FILTER EXISTS { ?transformer grid:hasMeter ?meter . }
  MINUS { ?meter grid:measures ?load . FILTER(?load = ?substation) }
}

   │  ╚══ GroupElem (count)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=transformer) (bindingState=bound)
   └── ExtensionElem (count)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=transformer) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?transformer) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?name { "Substation 0" "Substation 1" }
  ?substation <http://example.com/theme/grid/name> ?name .
  ?transformer <http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds> ?substation .
  ?transformer a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Transformer> .
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?transformer <http://example.com/theme/grid/hasMeter> ?meter .
  }
}

            Var (name=transformer) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?transformer) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?name { "Substation 0" "Substation 1" }
  ?substation <http://example.com/theme/grid/name> ?name .
  ?transformer <http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds> ?substation .
  ?transformer a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Transformer> .
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?transformer <http://example.com/theme/grid/hasMeter> ?meter .
  }
}

# Run progress: 84.09% complete, ETA 00:04:22
# Fork: 1 of 1
# Warmup Iteration   1:
### Original Query ###
PREFIX grid: <http://example.com/theme/grid/>
SELECT ?substation (COUNT(DISTINCT ?transformer) AS ?transformerCount) WHERE {
  ?substation a grid:Substation ; grid:name ?name .
  OPTIONAL { ?substation grid:feeds ?transformer . BIND(?transformer AS ?optTransformer) }
  FILTER(?optTransformer != ?substation)
  FILTER EXISTS { ?transformer grid:hasMeter ?meter . }
}
GROUP BY ?substation
HAVING(COUNT(?transformer) > 0)

SELECT ?substation (COUNT(DISTINCT ?transformer) AS ?transformerCount) WHERE {
  ?substation a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Substation> .
  ?substation <http://example.com/theme/grid/name> ?name .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?substation <http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds> ?transformer .
    BIND(?transformer AS ?optTransformer)
  }
  FILTER ((?optTransformer != ?substation) && EXISTS { ?transformer <http://example.com/theme/grid/hasMeter> ?meter . })
}
GROUP BY ?substation
HAVING (COUNT(?transformer) > 0)

SELECT ?substation (COUNT(DISTINCT ?transformer) AS ?transformerCount) WHERE {
  ?substation a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Substation> .
  ?substation <http://example.com/theme/grid/name> ?name .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?substation <http://example.com/theme/grid/feeds> ?transformer .
    BIND(?transformer AS ?optTransformer)
  }
  FILTER ((?optTransformer != ?substation) && EXISTS { ?transformer <http://example.com/theme/grid/hasMeter> ?meter . })
}
GROUP BY ?substation
HAVING (COUNT(?transformer) > 0)

### Original Query ###
PREFIX grid: <http://example.com/theme/grid/>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?line) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?line a grid:Line ; grid:capacity ?cap .
  FILTER(?cap IN (500, 600, 700))
  OPTIONAL { ?line grid:connectsTo ?substation . }
  MINUS { ?line grid:capacity ?cap2 . FILTER(?cap2 < 500) }
}

   │  ║           s: Var (name=line) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║           p: Var (name=_const_342e0de3_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/grid/connectsTo, anonymous)
   │  ║           o: Var (name=substation) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ╚══ GroupElem (count)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=line) (bindingState=bound)
   └── ExtensionElem (count)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=line) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?line) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?line <http://example.com/theme/grid/capacity> ?cap .
  FILTER (?cap IN (500, 600, 700))
  ?line a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Line> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?line <http://example.com/theme/grid/connectsTo> ?substation .
  }
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    {
      ?line <http://example.com/theme/grid/capacity> ?cap2 .
      FILTER (?cap2 < 500)
    }
  }
}

            Var (name=line) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?line) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?line <http://example.com/theme/grid/capacity> ?cap .
  FILTER (?cap IN (500, 600, 700))
  ?line a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Line> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?line <http://example.com/theme/grid/connectsTo> ?substation .
  }
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    {
      ?line <http://example.com/theme/grid/capacity> ?cap2 .
      FILTER (?cap2 < 500)
    }
  }
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX grid: <http://example.com/theme/grid/>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?meter) AS ?count) WHERE {
  { ?meter a grid:Meter ; grid:measures ?load . }
  UNION
  { ?meter a grid:Meter ; grid:measures ?load . ?load grid:loadValue ?value . }
  OPTIONAL { ?load grid:loadValue ?optValue . }
  FILTER(?optValue > 200)
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?load grid:loadValue ?low . FILTER(?low < 50) }
}

   │  ║     ║           p: Var (name=_const_f5e5585a_uri, value=http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type, anonymous)
   │  ║     ║           o: Var (name=_const_33f4134a_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/grid/Meter, anonymous)
   │  ║     ╚══ StatementPattern (costEstimate=336.2K, resultSizeEstimate=1.00, plannedAccessRows=1.00, plannedAccessWorkRows=1.00, plannedRepeatedInvocations=336.2K, plannedIndexPrefixLength=2.00, plannedAccessPathCandidates=4.00, plannedDistinctLookupBindings=336.2K, plannedWorkRows=336.2K, plannedIndexName=spoc, plannedIndexAccessMode=directLookup, plannedLookupComponents=[S, P], plannerId=lmdb-sketch, plannedEstimateSource=lmdb-access-path) [right]
   │  ║           s: Var (name=load) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║           p: Var (name=_const_3cb27b8c_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/grid/loadValue, anonymous)
   │  ║           o: Var (name=optValue) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ╚══ GroupElem (count)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=meter) (bindingState=bound)
   └── ExtensionElem (count)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=meter) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?meter) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?meter a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Meter> .
    ?meter <http://example.com/theme/grid/measures> ?load .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?load <http://example.com/theme/grid/loadValue> ?value .
    ?meter <http://example.com/theme/grid/measures> ?load .
    ?meter a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Meter> .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?load <http://example.com/theme/grid/loadValue> ?optValue .
  }
  FILTER ((?optValue > 200) && NOT EXISTS { ?load <http://example.com/theme/grid/loadValue> ?low . FILTER (?low < 50) })
}

   └── ExtensionElem (count) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
         Count (Distinct) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
            Var (name=meter) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?meter) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?meter a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Meter> .
    ?meter <http://example.com/theme/grid/measures> ?load .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?load <http://example.com/theme/grid/loadValue> ?value .
    ?meter <http://example.com/theme/grid/measures> ?load .
    ?meter a <http://example.com/theme/grid/Meter> .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?load <http://example.com/theme/grid/loadValue> ?optValue .
  }
  FILTER ((?optValue > 200) && NOT EXISTS { ?load <http://example.com/theme/grid/loadValue> ?low . FILTER (?low < 50) })
}

PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?disease { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/0>
                    <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/1> }
  ?trial a pharma:ClinicalTrial ; pharma:studiesDisease ?disease ; pharma:hasArm ?arm .
  ?arm pharma:armDrug ?drug ; pharma:hasResult ?result .
  ?result pharma:pValue ?p ; pharma:effectSize ?effect .
  OPTIONAL { ?result pharma:biomarker ?marker . BIND(?marker AS ?optMarker) }
  FILTER(?optMarker != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/999>)
  FILTER(?p < 0.05 || ?effect > 0.7)
}

6.208 ms/op

Iteration   1: 5.119 ms/op

         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=drug) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?disease { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/0> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/1> }
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/studiesDisease> ?disease .
  ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result .
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?drug .
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/pValue> ?p .
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/effectSize> ?effect .
  FILTER ((?p < 0.05) || (?effect > 0.7))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker> ?marker .
    BIND(?marker AS ?optMarker)
  }
  FILTER (?optMarker != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/999>)
}

         Count (Distinct) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
            Var (name=drug) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?disease { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/0> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/1> }
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/studiesDisease> ?disease .
  ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result .
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?drug .
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/pValue> ?p .
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/effectSize> ?effect .
  FILTER ((?p < 0.05) || (?effect > 0.7))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker> ?marker .
    BIND(?marker AS ?optMarker)
  }
  FILTER (?optMarker != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/999>)
}

# Parameters: (themeName = PHARMA, z_queryIndex = 1)

# Run progress: 88.64% complete, ETA 00:03:06
# Fork: 1 of 1
# Warmup Iteration   1:
### Original Query ###
PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?combo (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?drugCount) WHERE {
  ?combo a pharma:Combination ; pharma:combinationOf ?drug ; pharma:synergyScore ?score .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug pharma:hasSideEffect ?sideEffect .
    ?sideEffect pharma:severity ?sev .
    BIND(?sev AS ?optSeverity)
  }
  FILTER(?optSeverity IN ("Mild", "Moderate"))
  FILTER(?score > 0.7)
}
GROUP BY ?combo
HAVING(COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) >= 2)

   │  ║              │  ║     o: Var (name=sideEffect) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ║              │  ╚══ StatementPattern (costEstimate=2.00, resultSizeEstimate=1.00, plannedUncertaintyRows=0, plannedAccessRows=1.00, plannedAccessWorkRows=1.00, plannedIndexPrefixLength=2.00, plannedAccessPathCandidates=4.00, plannedWorkRows=2.00, plannedIndexName=spoc, plannedIndexAccessMode=directLookup, plannedLookupComponents=[S, P], plannedBoundVars=combo,drug,score,sideEffect, plannerId=lmdb-sketch, plannerAlgorithm=DYNAMIC_PROGRAMMING, plannerPath=ROBUST_USED, optimizer.decisionTrace=pareto-memo selected (workRows=4.0, finalRows=1.0, path=ROBUST_USED), plannedEstimateSource=lmdb-access-path, optimizer.physicalRefinement=costModel=lmdb, accessPathSelection=per-step, optimizer.runtimeHints=runtimeCorrection=none, optimizer.runtimeFeedback=filterFeedback=none, optimizer.logicalExploration=mode=pareto-memo, frontierLimit=8, beamWidth=8, candidates=4, accepted=3, rejectedAlternatives=1, dominated=1, trimmed=0, maxFrontierWidth=1, finalFrontierWidth=1, finalVector=JoinCostVector{totalWorkRows=4.0, finalRows=1.0, maxIntermediateRows=1.0, uncertaintyRows=0.0, cartesianWorkRows=0.0}, finalFrontier=[{order=[0:SP(?drug http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect ?sideEffect), 1:SP(?sideEffect http://example.com/theme/pharma/severity ?sev)], vector=JoinCostVector{totalWorkRows=4.0, finalRows=1.0, maxIntermediateRows=1.0, uncertaintyRows=0.0, cartesianWorkRows=0.0}}], sharedJoinVars=[sideEffect]) [right]
   │  ║              │        s: Var (name=sideEffect) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║              │        p: Var (name=_const_dff9bba5_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/pharma/severity, anonymous)
   │  ║              │        o: Var (name=sev) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ║              └── ExtensionElem (optSeverity)
   │  ║                    Var (name=sev) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║        GroupElem (_anon_having_019862bcf9c7cae6b42779fcaf5acfd02b244)
   │  ║           Count (Distinct)
   │  ║              Var (name=drug) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║        GroupElem (drugCount)
   │  ║           Count (Distinct)
   │  ║              Var (name=drug) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ╚══ ExtensionElem (_anon_having_019862bcf9c7cae6b42779fcaf5acfd02b244)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=drug) (bindingState=unbound)
   └── ExtensionElem (drugCount)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=drug) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT ?combo (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?drugCount) WHERE {
  ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/synergyScore> ?score .
  FILTER (?score > 0.7)
  ?combo a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Combination> .
  ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/combinationOf> ?drug .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect> ?sideEffect .
    ?sideEffect <http://example.com/theme/pharma/severity> ?sev .
    BIND(?sev AS ?optSeverity)
  }
  FILTER (?optSeverity IN ("Mild", "Moderate"))
}
GROUP BY ?combo
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) >= 2)

SELECT ?combo (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?drugCount) WHERE {
  ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/synergyScore> ?score .
  FILTER (?score > 0.7)
  ?combo a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Combination> .
  ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/combinationOf> ?drug .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect> ?sideEffect .
    ?sideEffect <http://example.com/theme/pharma/severity> ?sev .
    BIND(?sev AS ?optSeverity)
  }
  FILTER (?optSeverity IN ("Mild", "Moderate"))
}
GROUP BY ?combo
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) >= 2)

1.240 ms/op

# Run progress: 89.77% complete, ETA 00:02:47

# Warmup Iteration   1:
### Original Query ###
PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?target (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?drugCount) WHERE {
  ?target a pharma:Target ; pharma:inPathway ?pathway .
  ?drug a pharma:Drug ; pharma:targets ?target .
  OPTIONAL { ?drug pharma:indicatedFor ?disease . BIND(?disease AS ?optDisease) }
  FILTER(?optDisease IN (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/2>,
                         <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/3>))
  FILTER EXISTS { ?trial pharma:hasArm ?arm . ?arm pharma:armDrug ?drug . }
}
GROUP BY ?target
HAVING(COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) > 2)

   │  ║           ║        p: Var (name=_const_f5e5585a_uri, value=http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type, anonymous)

   │  ║           ╚══ Extension (costEstimate=2.7K, resultSizeEstimate=1.00, plannedWorkRows=2.7K, plannerId=lmdb-sketch, plannedEstimateSource=lmdb-synthetic) [right]

   │  ║              │     s: Var (name=drug) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║              │     p: Var (name=_const_e46c34a6_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/pharma/indicatedFor, anonymous)
   │  ║              │     o: Var (name=disease) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ║              └── ExtensionElem (optDisease)
   │  ║                    Var (name=disease) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║        GroupElem (_anon_having_6317efeab053efe54a928a25f47ef7c8b71f012345)
   │  ║           Count (Distinct)
   │  ║              Var (name=drug) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║        GroupElem (drugCount)
   │  ║           Count (Distinct)
   │  ║              Var (name=drug) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ╚══ ExtensionElem (_anon_having_6317efeab053efe54a928a25f47ef7c8b71f012345)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=drug) (bindingState=unbound)
   └── ExtensionElem (drugCount)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=drug) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT ?target (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?drugCount) WHERE {
  ?target a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Target> .
  ?target <http://example.com/theme/pharma/inPathway> ?pathway .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  ?drug a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Drug> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/indicatedFor> ?disease .
    BIND(?disease AS ?optDisease)
  }
  FILTER ((?optDisease IN (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/2>, <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/3>)) && EXISTS { ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?drug . ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm . })
}
GROUP BY ?target
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) > 2)

SELECT ?target (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?drugCount) WHERE {
  ?target a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Target> .
  ?target <http://example.com/theme/pharma/inPathway> ?pathway .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  ?drug a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Drug> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/indicatedFor> ?disease .
    BIND(?disease AS ?optDisease)
  }
  FILTER ((?optDisease IN (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/2>, <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/3>)) && EXISTS { ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?drug . ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm . })
}
GROUP BY ?target
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) > 2)

### Original Query ###
PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?drug ?disease WHERE {
  ?trial a pharma:ClinicalTrial ; pharma:studiesDisease ?disease ; pharma:hasArm ?arm .
  ?arm pharma:armDrug ?drug ; pharma:hasResult ?result .
  ?result pharma:responseRate ?rate .
  FILTER(?rate > 0.6)
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?drug pharma:indicatedFor ?disease . }
  OPTIONAL { ?drug pharma:targets ?target . BIND(?target AS ?optTarget) }
  FILTER(?optTarget != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/target/0>)
}

      ╚══ Extension (costEstimate=12.3K, resultSizeEstimate=1.00, plannedWorkRows=12.3K, plannerId=lmdb-sketch, plannedEstimateSource=lmdb-synthetic) [right]
         ├── StatementPattern (costEstimate=12.2K, resultSizeEstimate=1.00, plannedAccessRows=1.00, plannedAccessWorkRows=1.00, plannedRepeatedInvocations=12.2K, plannedIndexPrefixLength=2.00, plannedAccessPathCandidates=4.00, plannedDistinctLookupBindings=12.2K, plannedWorkRows=12.2K, plannedIndexName=spoc, plannedIndexAccessMode=directLookup, plannedLookupComponents=[S, P], plannerId=lmdb-sketch, plannedEstimateSource=lmdb-access-path)
         │     s: Var (name=drug) (bindingState=bound)
         │     p: Var (name=_const_7f67635a_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets, anonymous)
         │     o: Var (name=target) (bindingState=unbound)
         └── ExtensionElem (optTarget)
               Var (name=target) (bindingState=bound)

SELECT ?drug ?disease WHERE {
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result .
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/responseRate> ?rate .
  FILTER (?rate > 0.6)
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
  ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/studiesDisease> ?disease .
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?drug .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/indicatedFor> ?disease .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
    BIND(?target AS ?optTarget)
  }
  FILTER (?optTarget != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/target/0>)
}

         └── ExtensionElem (optTarget) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
               Var (name=target) (bindingState=bound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT ?drug ?disease WHERE {
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result .
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/responseRate> ?rate .
  FILTER (?rate > 0.6)
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
  ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/studiesDisease> ?disease .
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?drug .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/indicatedFor> ?disease .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
    BIND(?target AS ?optTarget)
  }
  FILTER (?optTarget != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/target/0>)
}

# Run progress: 92.05% complete, ETA 00:02:10
# Fork: 1 of 1
# Warmup Iteration   1:
### Original Query ###
PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?count) WHERE {
  { ?drug a pharma:Drug ; pharma:hasMolecule ?mol . }
  UNION
  { ?combo a pharma:Combination ; pharma:combinationOf ?drug .
    ?drug pharma:hasMolecule ?mol . }
  ?mol pharma:inClass ?class .
  OPTIONAL { ?class pharma:name ?optName . BIND(?optName AS ?optClassName) }
  FILTER(?optClassName != "")
  MINUS { ?drug pharma:contraindicatedFor ?disease .
          FILTER(?disease IN (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/4>,
                              <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/5>)) }
}

   │  ║     ║     ValueConstant (value=http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/5)
   │  ║     ╚══ StatementPattern (costEstimate=5.0K, resultSizeEstimate=5.0K, plannedAccessRows=5.0K, plannedAccessWorkRows=5.0K, plannedIndexPrefixLength=1.00, plannedAccessPathCandidates=4.00, plannedWorkRows=5.0K, plannedIndexName=posc, plannedIndexAccessMode=prefixScan, plannedLookupComponents=[P], plannerId=lmdb-sketch, plannedEstimateSource=lmdb-access-path)
   │  ║           s: Var (name=drug) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ║           p: Var (name=_const_28b88607_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/pharma/contraindicatedFor, anonymous)
   │  ║           o: Var (name=disease) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ╚══ GroupElem (count)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=drug) (bindingState=bound)
   └── ExtensionElem (count)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=drug) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?drug a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Drug> .
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasMolecule> ?mol .
    ?mol <http://example.com/theme/pharma/inClass> ?class .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?combo a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Combination> .
    ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/combinationOf> ?drug .
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasMolecule> ?mol .
    ?mol <http://example.com/theme/pharma/inClass> ?class .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?class <http://example.com/theme/pharma/name> ?optName .
    BIND(?optName AS ?optClassName)
  }
  FILTER (?optClassName != "")
  MINUS {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/contraindicatedFor> ?disease .
    FILTER (?disease IN (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/4>, <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/5>))
  }
}

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    ?drug a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Drug> .
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasMolecule> ?mol .
    ?mol <http://example.com/theme/pharma/inClass> ?class .
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?combo a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Combination> .
    ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/combinationOf> ?drug .
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasMolecule> ?mol .
    ?mol <http://example.com/theme/pharma/inClass> ?class .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?class <http://example.com/theme/pharma/name> ?optName .
    BIND(?optName AS ?optClassName)
  }
  FILTER (?optClassName != "")
  MINUS {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/contraindicatedFor> ?disease .
    FILTER (?disease IN (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/4>, <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/5>))
  }
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?trial) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?marker { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/0>
                   <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/1>
                   <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/2> }
  ?trial a pharma:ClinicalTrial ; pharma:hasArm ?arm .
  ?arm pharma:hasResult ?result .
  ?result pharma:biomarker ?marker ; pharma:pValue ?p .
  OPTIONAL { ?result pharma:effectSize ?effect . BIND(?effect AS ?optEffect) }
  FILTER(?optEffect > 0.3)
  FILTER(?p < 0.05 || ?p = 0.05)
}

         Count (Distinct) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
            Var (name=trial) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?trial) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?marker { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/0> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/1> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/2> }
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker> ?marker .
  ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result .
  ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/pValue> ?p .
  FILTER ((?p < 0.05) || (?p = 0.05))
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
  ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/effectSize> ?effect .
    BIND(?effect AS ?optEffect)
  }
  FILTER (?optEffect > 0.3)
}

# JMH version: 1.37

# Benchmark mode: Average time, time/op
# Benchmark: org.eclipse.rdf4j.sail.lmdb.benchmark.ThemeQueryBenchmark.executeQuery
# Parameters: (themeName = PHARMA, z_queryIndex = 6)

# Run progress: 94.32% complete, ETA 00:01:32
# Fork: 1 of 1
# Warmup Iteration   1:
### Original Query ###
PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?combo (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) AS ?sharedTargets) WHERE {
  ?combo a pharma:Combination ; pharma:combinationOf ?drugA ; pharma:combinationOf ?drugB .
  FILTER(?drugA != ?drugB)
  ?drugA pharma:targets ?target .
  ?drugB pharma:targets ?target .
  OPTIONAL { ?drugA pharma:hasSideEffect ?sideEffect . BIND(?sideEffect AS ?optSideEffect) }
  FILTER(?optSideEffect != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/side-effect/0>)
  FILTER EXISTS { ?drugB pharma:hasSideEffect ?sideEffect2 . }
}
GROUP BY ?combo
HAVING(COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) > 1)

   │  ║              │     s: Var (name=drugA) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║              │     p: Var (name=_const_72f8dc5a_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect, anonymous)
   │  ║              │     o: Var (name=sideEffect) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ║              └── ExtensionElem (optSideEffect)
   │  ║                    Var (name=sideEffect) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║        GroupElem (_anon_having_0291316b854d0bfa94d129eff0211feacaa7a)
   │  ║           Count (Distinct)
   │  ║              Var (name=target) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║        GroupElem (sharedTargets)
   │  ║           Count (Distinct)
   │  ║              Var (name=target) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ╚══ ExtensionElem (_anon_having_0291316b854d0bfa94d129eff0211feacaa7a)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=target) (bindingState=unbound)
   └── ExtensionElem (sharedTargets)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=target) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT ?combo (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) AS ?sharedTargets) WHERE {
  ?combo a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Combination> .
  ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/combinationOf> ?drugA .
  ?drugA <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/combinationOf> ?drugB .
  FILTER (?drugA != ?drugB)
  ?drugB <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drugA <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect> ?sideEffect .
    BIND(?sideEffect AS ?optSideEffect)
  }
  FILTER ((?optSideEffect != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/side-effect/0>) && EXISTS { ?drugB <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect> ?sideEffect2 . })
}
GROUP BY ?combo
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) > 1)

            Var (name=target) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT ?combo (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) AS ?sharedTargets) WHERE {
  ?combo a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Combination> .
  ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/combinationOf> ?drugA .
  ?drugA <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  ?combo <http://example.com/theme/pharma/combinationOf> ?drugB .
  FILTER (?drugA != ?drugB)
  ?drugB <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drugA <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect> ?sideEffect .
    BIND(?sideEffect AS ?optSideEffect)
  }
  FILTER ((?optSideEffect != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/side-effect/0>) && EXISTS { ?drugB <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect> ?sideEffect2 . })
}
GROUP BY ?combo
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) > 1)

### Original Query ###
PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?arm) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?trial a pharma:ClinicalTrial ; pharma:hasArm ?arm .
  { ?arm pharma:armComparator ?comp . }
  UNION
  { ?arm pharma:armDrug ?comp . }
  OPTIONAL { ?comp pharma:name ?optName . BIND(?optName AS ?optCompName) }
  FILTER(?optCompName != "")
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?arm pharma:hasResult ?r . ?r pharma:pValue ?p .
                      FILTER(?p IN (0.08, 0.09)) }
}

   │  ║        │     o: Var (name=optName) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ║        └── ExtensionElem (optCompName)
   │  ║              Var (name=optName) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ╚══ GroupElem (count)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=arm) (bindingState=bound)
   └── ExtensionElem (count)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=arm) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?arm) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
  ?arm (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/armComparator>|<http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug>) ?comp .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?comp <http://example.com/theme/pharma/name> ?optName .
    BIND(?optName AS ?optCompName)
  }
  FILTER ((?optCompName != "") && NOT EXISTS { ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?r . ?r <http://example.com/theme/pharma/pValue> ?p . FILTER (?p IN (0.08, 0.09)) })
}

            Var (name=arm) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?arm) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
  ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
  ?arm (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/armComparator>|<http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug>) ?comp .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?comp <http://example.com/theme/pharma/name> ?optName .
    BIND(?optName AS ?optCompName)
  }
  FILTER ((?optCompName != "") && NOT EXISTS { ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?r . ?r <http://example.com/theme/pharma/pValue> ?p . FILTER (?p IN (0.08, 0.09)) })
}

# Parameters: (themeName = PHARMA, z_queryIndex = 8)

# Run progress: 96.59% complete, ETA 00:00:55
# Fork: 1 of 1
# Warmup Iteration   1:
### Original Query ###
PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?drug (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) AS ?targetCount) WHERE {
  ?drug a pharma:Drug ; pharma:targets ?target .
  OPTIONAL { ?drug pharma:hasMolecule ?mol . BIND(?mol AS ?optMol) }
  FILTER(?optMol != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/molecule/0>)
  MINUS { ?drug pharma:contraindicatedFor ?disease .
          FILTER(?disease = <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/6>
                 || ?disease = <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/7>) }
}
GROUP BY ?drug
HAVING(COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) >= 3)

   │  ║           Count (Distinct)
   │  ║              Var (name=target) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║        GroupElem (targetCount)
   │  ║           Count (Distinct)
   │  ║              Var (name=target) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ╚══ ExtensionElem (_anon_having_07659753d5b1f8f24411ac76fa9e746ff258)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=target) (bindingState=unbound)
   └── ExtensionElem (targetCount)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=target) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT ?drug (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) AS ?targetCount) WHERE {
  ?drug a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Drug> .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasMolecule> ?mol .
    BIND(?mol AS ?optMol)
  }
  FILTER (?optMol != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/molecule/0>)
  MINUS {
    {
      VALUES ?disease { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/6> }
      ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/contraindicatedFor> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/6> .
    }
    UNION
    {
      VALUES ?disease { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/7> }
      ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/contraindicatedFor> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/7> .
    }
  }
}
GROUP BY ?drug
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) >= 3)

            Var (name=target) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT ?drug (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) AS ?targetCount) WHERE {
  ?drug a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Drug> .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasMolecule> ?mol .
    BIND(?mol AS ?optMol)
  }
  FILTER (?optMol != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/molecule/0>)
  MINUS {
    {
      VALUES ?disease { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/6> }
      ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/contraindicatedFor> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/6> .
    }
    UNION
    {
      VALUES ?disease { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/7> }
      ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/contraindicatedFor> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/7> .
    }
  }
}
GROUP BY ?drug
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?target) >= 3)

# Run progress: 97.73% complete, ETA 00:00:37
# Fork: 1 of 1
# Warmup Iteration   1:
### Original Query ###
PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    SELECT ?drug (AVG(?effect) AS ?avgEffect) WHERE {
      ?trial a pharma:ClinicalTrial ; pharma:hasArm ?arm .
      ?arm pharma:armDrug ?drug ; pharma:hasResult ?result .
      ?result pharma:effectSize ?effect .
      OPTIONAL { ?result pharma:responseRate ?rate . BIND(?rate AS ?optRate) }
      FILTER(?optRate > 0.2)
    }
    GROUP BY ?drug
    HAVING(AVG(?effect) > 0.4)
  }
  FILTER EXISTS { ?drug pharma:hasSideEffect ?se . }
  OPTIONAL { ?drug pharma:indicatedFor ?disease . BIND(?disease AS ?optDisease) }
  FILTER(?optDisease IN (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/8>,
                         <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/9>))
}

   │  ║     ║     ║  │           Avg
   │  ║     ║     ║  │              Var (name=effect) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║     ║     ║  │        GroupElem (avgEffect)

   │  ║     ║     ║  │              Var (name=effect) (bindingState=bound)

   │  ║     ║              Var (name=effect) (bindingState=unbound)

   │  ║        ├── StatementPattern (costEstimate=11.5K, resultSizeEstimate=1.00, plannedAccessRows=1.00, plannedAccessWorkRows=1.00, plannedRepeatedInvocations=11.5K, plannedIndexPrefixLength=2.00, plannedAccessPathCandidates=4.00, plannedWorkRows=11.5K, plannedIndexName=spoc, plannedIndexAccessMode=directLookup, plannedLookupComponents=[S, P], plannerId=lmdb-sketch, plannedEstimateSource=lmdb-access-path)
   │  ║        │     s: Var (name=drug) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║        │     p: Var (name=_const_e46c34a6_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/pharma/indicatedFor, anonymous)
   │  ║        │     o: Var (name=disease) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ║        └── ExtensionElem (optDisease)
   │  ║              Var (name=disease) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ╚══ GroupElem (count)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=drug) (bindingState=bound)
   └── ExtensionElem (count)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=drug) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    SELECT ?drug (AVG(?effect) AS ?avgEffect) WHERE {
      ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result .
      ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/effectSize> ?effect .
      ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
      ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
      ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?drug .
      OPTIONAL {
        ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/responseRate> ?rate .
        BIND(?rate AS ?optRate)
      }
      FILTER (?optRate > 0.2)
    }
    GROUP BY ?drug
    HAVING (AVG(?effect) > 0.4)
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/indicatedFor> ?disease .
    BIND(?disease AS ?optDisease)
  }
  FILTER ((?optDisease IN (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/8>, <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/9>)) && EXISTS { ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect> ?se . })
}

   │  ║        └── ExtensionElem (optDisease) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

   │        Count (Distinct) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
   │           Var (name=drug) (bindingState=bound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
   └── ExtensionElem (count) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
         Count (Distinct) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
            Var (name=drug) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    SELECT ?drug (AVG(?effect) AS ?avgEffect) WHERE {
      ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result .
      ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/effectSize> ?effect .
      ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm .
      ?trial a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/ClinicalTrial> .
      ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/armDrug> ?drug .
      OPTIONAL {
        ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/responseRate> ?rate .
        BIND(?rate AS ?optRate)
      }
      FILTER (?optRate > 0.2)
    }
    GROUP BY ?drug
    HAVING (AVG(?effect) > 0.4)
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/indicatedFor> ?disease .
    BIND(?disease AS ?optDisease)
  }
  FILTER ((?optDisease IN (<http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/8>, <http://example.com/theme/pharma/disease/9>)) && EXISTS { ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasSideEffect> ?se . })
}

### Original Query ###
PREFIX pharma: <http://example.com/theme/pharma/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?pathway (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?drugCount) WHERE {
  VALUES ?marker { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/3>
                   <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/4> }
  ?drug a pharma:Drug ; pharma:targets ?target .
  ?target pharma:inPathway ?pathway .
  OPTIONAL { ?drug pharma:testedIn ?trial . BIND(?trial AS ?optTrial) }
  FILTER(?optTrial != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/trial/0>)
  FILTER EXISTS { ?trial pharma:hasArm ?arm . ?arm pharma:hasResult ?result .
                  ?result pharma:biomarker ?marker . }
}
GROUP BY ?pathway
HAVING(COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) > 1)

165.807 ms/op

   │  ║              │     s: Var (name=drug) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║              │     p: Var (name=_const_4389be5e_uri, value=http://example.com/theme/pharma/testedIn, anonymous)
   │  ║              │     o: Var (name=trial) (bindingState=unbound)
   │  ║              └── ExtensionElem (optTrial)
   │  ║                    Var (name=trial) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║        GroupElem (_anon_having_69816308bdcf539441e9b30eda4c45c5806012345)
   │  ║           Count (Distinct)
   │  ║              Var (name=drug) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ║        GroupElem (drugCount)
   │  ║           Count (Distinct)
   │  ║              Var (name=drug) (bindingState=bound)
   │  ╚══ ExtensionElem (_anon_having_69816308bdcf539441e9b30eda4c45c5806012345)
   │        Count (Distinct)
   │           Var (name=drug) (bindingState=unbound)
   └── ExtensionElem (drugCount)
         Count (Distinct)
            Var (name=drug) (bindingState=unbound)

SELECT ?pathway (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?drugCount) WHERE {
  ?target <http://example.com/theme/pharma/inPathway> ?pathway .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  ?drug a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Drug> .
  VALUES ?marker { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/3> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/4> }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/testedIn> ?trial .
    BIND(?trial AS ?optTrial)
  }
  FILTER ((?optTrial != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/trial/0>) && EXISTS { ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker> ?marker . ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result . ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm . })
}
GROUP BY ?pathway
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) > 1)

         Count (Distinct) (hasNextFalseCountActual=0)
            Var (name=drug) (bindingState=unbound, hasNextFalseCountActual=0)

SELECT ?pathway (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) AS ?drugCount) WHERE {
  ?target <http://example.com/theme/pharma/inPathway> ?pathway .
  ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/targets> ?target .
  ?drug a <http://example.com/theme/pharma/Drug> .
  VALUES ?marker { <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/3> <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker/4> }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?drug <http://example.com/theme/pharma/testedIn> ?trial .
    BIND(?trial AS ?optTrial)
  }
  FILTER ((?optTrial != <http://example.com/theme/pharma/trial/0>) && EXISTS { ?result <http://example.com/theme/pharma/biomarker> ?marker . ?arm <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasResult> ?result . ?trial <http://example.com/theme/pharma/hasArm> ?arm . })
}
GROUP BY ?pathway
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?drug) > 1)

  140.262 ms/op
